title: What Is a Protocol?
description: A protocol is a shared rule set that independent participants follow to coordinate behavior without central control. Bitcoin works as a monetary protocol because nodes enforce rules the same way.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: P2P Network
resources.notes: Concrete example of protocol rules in a peer network.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Academy: Consensus Model
resources.notes: How protocol rules produce shared canonical state.

resources.title: Inventing Bitcoin
resources.notes: Accessible first technical mental model for protocol rules, nodes, and consensus.
